metadata.description: Deep analysis of 3 independent humanized VHH from SAbDab (RCSB full-text search: humanized VHH)

methods.germline_identity: Per-FR pairwise identity vs IMGT IGHV reference; FR3 aligned by YADSVK anchor

6CNW.origin: Hybrid VHH-VH3 scaffold (CDRs on human framework)
6CNW.pos52_vincke: W (human germline equivalent; Vincke: G/A camelid→W detrimental, but W is already the IGHV3-66 natural residue)

germline_analysis.interpretation: Near-perfect IGHV3-66 match (98.7%). CDRs grafted onto VH3 framework. Differs from IGHV3-23 only in FR2 positions (MYWL vs MSWV = pos44 Q retained, pos45 A, pos47 G retained; GLEW motif identical)

mutation_delta_vs_camelid.camelid_parent: None — hybrid scaffold, CDRs grafted de novo onto human VH3-66 framework
mutation_delta_vs_camelid.note: 6CNW represents de novo CDR grafting strategy, not humanization of existing camelid VHH

rule_validation.R5_IGHV3_template: PARTIAL — IGHV3-66 used (not IGHV3-23); IGHV3-66 is same VH3 subfamily, structurally equivalent

6XDG.species_annotation: mus musculus (SAbDab annotation; VHH domain is humanized)
6XDG.pos52_vincke: W (IGHV3-23 natural residue; not a problematic mutation)

germline_analysis.interpretation: Well-humanized VHH on IGHV3-23 scaffold (91.1%). FR1 differs from IGHV3-23 at pos 6 (K→Q) and pos 13 (L→K). FR2 retains VHH QAG hallmark. FR3 has 3 VHH-specific positions.

FR3_mutation_notes.S16A: IGHV3-23 pos16=S; 6XDG=A. VHH-specific (common in camelid VHH FR3)

mutation_delta_vs_camelid.camelid_parent: Not deposited in same PDB. Original camelid VHH unknown (SAbDab annotated as mus musculus, likely erroneous)
mutation_delta_vs_camelid.estimated_FR_mutations_vs_IGHV3_23: ~5 FR mutations total (2 in FR1, 2 in FR2 excluding VHH hallmarks, 3 in FR3)
mutation_delta_vs_camelid.note: Well-humanized VHH consistent with 'complete humanization' approach using IGHV3-23 backbone

7Q6C.target: von Willebrand factor A1 domain (vWF — anti-thrombosis)
7Q6C.origin: Caplacizumab-related anti-vWF VHH; Lama glama origin
7Q6C.pos52_vincke: F (Phe — camelid-like; NOT W; safe from Vincke perspective)

germline_analysis.interpretation: Partially humanized (81%). FR1 is VH3-like. FR2 retains more camelid character (64.7% IGHV3-23 identity) — VHH hallmark positions AND some surrounding camelid residues retained. FR3 diverges at 7 positions, consistent with Caplacizumab platform residues.

FR3_mutation_notes.N15D: Camelid-specific FR3 position in anti-vWF lineage
FR3_mutation_notes.A29P: Pro insertion in FR3 loop — VHH-specific structural feature

mutation_delta_vs_camelid.compared_to_5O0W: 76 total sequence differences vs Caplacizumab (5O0W chain E)
mutation_delta_vs_camelid.note: 76 differences span CDR1/CDR2/CDR3 primarily — these are different clones with different antigen contacts, not humanization mutations. Both are anti-vWF but 7Q6C and 5O0W represent different VHH molecules in the same platform lineage.
mutation_delta_vs_camelid.humanization_FR_mutations_estimated: ~12-15 FR mutations vs original llama VHH (FR1≈4, FR2≈5, FR3≈7); original llama sequence not deposited

rule_validation.R5_IGHV3_template: PASS — IGHV3-23 (81.0%; partial humanization retaining platform-specific FR3 residues)
